sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: MEDIA ALERT: Equinix Sets Conference Call for First-Quarter Results
feed.summary: Equinix, Inc. (Nasdaq: EQIX) announced it will hold its quarterly conference call on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, at 5:30 p.m. ET to discuss its first-quarter results for the period ended March 31, 2026. Interested parties can access the call live via phone or webcast, with a replay available until June 30, 2026.

feed.title: NYSE Content Update: Versigent To Ring Opening Bell As its Shares Debut for Trade
feed.summary: Versigent (NYSE: VGNT) will ring the opening bell at the New York Stock Exchange as its shares begin trading following its spinoff from Aptiv (NYSE: APTV). CEO Joseph Liotine will join NYSE Live, along with TD Synnex (NYSE: SNX) CFO David Jordan discussing the company's financial results. The update also mentions other market activities including Blue Water Acquisition IV (NYSE: BWIV U) ringing the closing bell.

feed.title: Booking Holdings appoints ex-NXP Semiconductors CEO to board
feed.summary: Booking Holdings Inc. has appointed Kurt Sievers, former CEO of NXP Semiconductors, to its Board of Directors. Sievers brings decades of experience at the intersection of technology, mobility, and global consumer markets. This announcement comes as Director Lynn Radakovich prepares to retire, and Booking Holdings navigates a dynamic environment influenced by AI advancements and regulatory scrutiny, while its stock is considered undervalued by InvestingPro analysis.

feed.title: Franklin Templeton to acquire crypto firm 250 Digital
feed.summary: Franklin Templeton announced its plan to acquire 250 Digital, a cryptocurrency investment management firm, integrating its team and liquid crypto strategies. The acquisition, expected to close in Q2 2026, will establish a new Franklin Crypto unit led by Christopher Perkins and Seth Ginns. The deal includes BENJI tokens as payment, and Franklin Templeton will invest in the acquired strategies, further expanding its digital assets under management.

feed.title: Tapcheck Teams with Paychex to Deliver Seamless Embedded On-Demand Pay Solution Giving Instant Access to Worksite Employees
feed.summary: Tapcheck has partnered with Paychex to offer an embedded on-demand pay solution, allowing employees paid through Paychex HR PEO to access their earned wages instantly. This integration aims to enhance financial wellness, reduce administrative burden for employers, and improve employee retention without requiring new systems or process changes. The solution provides greater flexibility and control over cash flow for worksite employees.

feed.title: CarMax made Fortune’s best workplaces list for the 22nd straight year
feed.summary: CarMax (NYSE: KMX) has been recognized on Fortune’s 100 Best Companies to Work For® list for the 22nd consecutive year, ranking #56 in 2026. The company highlights its competitive pay, benefits, and positive workplace culture, which is determined by anonymous employee surveys. CarMax is also actively hiring for various roles across its retail and corporate operations.

feed.title: Reagan Calhoun Joins Coke Florida as Vice President and Chief of Staff
feed.summary: Coca-Cola Beverages Florida (Coke Florida) has appointed Reagan Calhoun as Vice President and Chief of Staff to Chairman & CEO Troy Taylor. Calhoun brings over two decades of experience within The Coca-Cola Company system, holding previous roles such as Vice President, Finance for Marketing and Supply Chain within the North America Operating Unit. Her appointment is expected to strengthen leadership alignment and accelerate progress on key priorities for Coke Florida.

feed.title: Teledyne secures new Royal Navy contract for ocean data technology
feed.summary: Teledyne Marine has secured a contract with the UK Ministry of Defence to enhance the Royal Navy's ability to collect oceanographic and environmental data. This agreement, part of the Future Maritime Data Gathering (FMDG) programme, will supply autonomous ocean systems like Sentinel and Slocum gliders and APEX floats to support operational planning and defence activities. The initiative aims to improve understanding of the underwater battlespace in the North Atlantic and expands the Royal Navy's use of uncrewed technologies, continuing an existing relationship with Teledyne Marine dating back to 2015.

feed.title: Snap-on Werkzeugwagen: Professional Tool Storage Solutions Driving Efficiency in North American Automotive and Industrial Markets
feed.summary: Snap-on's Werkzeugwagen series provides essential and durable tool storage solutions for professional mechanics and industrial technicians, with demand driven by growth in automotive repair volumes, particularly for electric and hybrid vehicles. These premium tool carts feature robust construction, customizable drawers, and ergonomic designs, contributing significantly to efficiency in workshops and supporting Snap-on Inc.'s revenue and market position in North America. The product line is noted for its high-load capacity, lifetime warranty, and advanced features like integrated power strips and IoT capabilities, ensuring strong customer retention and stable contribution to Snap-on's financial performance.

feed.title: Surprising Beneficiaries of High Gas Prices: BJs and Costco
feed.summary: The article "Surprising Beneficiaries of High Gas Prices: BJs and Costco" explores how these warehouse retailers might unexpectedly profit from increasing fuel costs. It suggests a potential shift in consumer behavior driven by the need to save money wherever possible.

feed.title: Verizon Stock Is Up 25% in the Past 3 Months. Here’s What the Valuation Says Now
feed.summary: Verizon Communications (VZ) stock has surged by over 25% in the last three months due to improved subscriber trends, broadband additions, and new management optimism. While the company's turnaround story is gaining traction, TIKR's valuation model suggests a modest potential upside of 6.1% to $53 per share by December 2028, or a 2.2% annualized return. This indicates that much of the near-term improvement may already be priced into the stock, and future gains will likely depend more on execution than a re-rating.

feed.title: Ulta Names Kristin Wolf Chief Strategy & Growth Officer
feed.summary: Ulta Beauty has appointed Kristin Wolf as its new Chief Strategy & Growth Officer, effective March 2026. In this role, Wolf will oversee Ulta's corporate strategy, corporate development, and efforts to build businesses in new growth segments, including international expansion and the company’s enterprise AI strategy. Wolf brings over two decades of experience in the consumer and retail industries and has been with Ulta Beauty since 2019, where she played a key role in the "Ulta Beauty Unleashed" strategy and the launch of the wellness category.

feed.title: Stocks making big moves yesterday: Chewy, Broadcom, Microsoft, RXO, and JPMorgan Chase
feed.summary: This article highlights several companies whose stocks made significant moves yesterday, April 1, 2026. Chewy, Broadcom, Microsoft, RXO, and JPMorgan Chase all saw their stock prices rise due to specific company announcements or broader market conditions. Each company's rise is attributed to distinct positive news, ranging from geopolitical developments to strategic investments and new initiatives.

feed.title: Booking Holdings appoints ex-NXP Semiconductors CEO to board By Investing.com
feed.summary: Booking Holdings Inc. has appointed Kurt Sievers, the former CEO of NXP Semiconductors, to its Board of Directors. Sievers' extensive experience in technology, mobility, and consumer markets is expected to bring valuable perspective to the company. Concurrently, Director Lynn Radakovich will retire from the Board in June after a decade of service.

feed.title: BMO Capital Adjusts Constellation Energy Price Target to $386 From $410, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: BMO Capital has revised its price target for Constellation Energy (CEG) to $386, down from the previous $410, while reaffirming its "Outperform" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst revisions, including KeyBanc and Wells Fargo also lowering their price targets for the energy company. Despite these target reductions, the general analyst consensus remains a "BUY" for Constellation Energy.

feed.title: International Paper (NYSE:IP) Earns Hold Rating from Analysts at Deutsche Bank Aktiengesellschaft
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank Aktiengesellschaft initiated coverage on International Paper (NYSE:IP) with a "hold" rating and a $38 price target, indicating a potential upside of 6.06%. While the company missed its quarterly EPS estimates, its revenue increased by 53.1% year-over-year. Recent insider buying by the CEO and a director signals some confidence, despite the stock's negative net margin and PE ratio.

feed.title: Huntington Ingalls Industries (NYSE:HII) Coverage Initiated by Analysts at Wells Fargo & Company
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has initiated coverage on Huntington Ingalls Industries (NYSE:HII) with an "equal weight" rating and a $400.00 price target, suggesting a 5.49% upside. This comes after HII reported strong earnings, beating expectations with $4.04 EPS and $3.48 billion in revenue. The consensus among analysts is a "Moderate Buy," with an average target price of $385.89, although some insiders have recently sold shares.

feed.title: Wells Fargo & Company Initiates Coverage on General Dynamics (NYSE:GD)
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has initiated coverage on General Dynamics (NYSE:GD) with an "overweight" rating and a $400 price target, suggesting a 16.4% upside. This aligns with a broader analyst consensus of a "Moderate Buy" for the aerospace company. While the company recently beat EPS and revenue expectations and provided strong FY2026 guidance, insiders sold over 51,000 shares worth approximately $18.1 million in the last three months.

feed.title: Wells Fargo & Company Begins Coverage on Textron (NYSE:TXT)
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has initiated coverage on Textron (NYSE:TXT) with an "equal weight" rating and a $92 price target, suggesting a 5.06% upside. This comes as Textron reported Q4 revenues of $4.18 billion and EPS of $1.73, while also setting FY2026 guidance and seeing notable insider stock sales. Analyst consensus on Textron is currently a "Hold" with an average target of $98.

feed.title: T. Rowe Price Group (NASDAQ:TROW) Price Target Lowered to $107.00 at Morgan Stanley
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has lowered its price target for T. Rowe Price Group (NASDAQ:TROW) to $107.00 from $115.00, maintaining an "equal weight" rating. This adjustment follows T. Rowe Price missing its Q4 EPS estimates, reporting $2.44 against an estimated $2.47, though revenue slightly exceeded expectations at $1.93 billion. Several other firms have also trimmed their price targets, contributing to a consensus "Reduce" rating and an average target price of $101.08 for the asset manager.

feed.title: Transdigm Group (NYSE:TDG) Coverage Initiated at Wells Fargo & Company
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company initiated coverage on Transdigm Group (NYSE:TDG) with an "equal weight" rating and a $1,200 price target, suggesting a 3.45% upside. The aerospace company recently beat its quarterly earnings expectations and provided strong FY2026 guidance. While institutional ownership is high and increasing, there has been significant insider selling of the stock.

feed.title: 12 Michigan counties move to one emergency dispatch platform
feed.summary: Tyler Technologies has secured a deal with Michigan’s Upper Peninsula 911 Authority, representing 12 counties, to implement its Enterprise CAD and Enterprise Mobile solutions powered by AWS. This initiative aims to unify emergency communications across these counties, enhancing coordination, situational awareness, and interoperability for public safety operations. The cloud-based platform, hosted in AWS GovCloud (US), will streamline cross-jurisdictional communication and provide first responders with faster access to critical information.

feed.title: Nephros Expands Water Safety Capabilities With ASSE 12080 Certified Water Management Planning Expertise
feed.summary: Nephros, Inc. has expanded its water safety support capabilities with the ASSE 12080 Legionella Water Safety and Management Specialist Certification earned by Brianne McGuire. This allows Nephros to offer consultative support and Water Management Program development services to healthcare facilities and other complex buildings. The company believes this new offering will provide additional value to customers, strengthen its overall value proposition, and open a new revenue stream through chargeable consulting services.

feed.title: Public Storage Operating Company Files For Senior Notes Due 2035, Size Not Disclosed
feed.summary: Public Storage Operating Company has filed for senior notes due in 2035. The size of the offering has not yet been disclosed. This announcement was made via a Refinitiv news search.

feed.title: 90% of MetLife employees express pride as Fortune honors workplace
feed.summary: MetLife (NYSE: MET) has been recognized as one of the Fortune 100 Best Companies to Work For® in the U.S. for the fourth consecutive year, based on employee feedback indicating a high-trust, high-performance culture. The recognition highlights that 90% of employees express pride in the company and 87% consider it a great place to work. In addition to its U.S. recognition, MetLife also ranked No. 10 on the Fortune World's 25 Best Workplaces™ list in 2025 and has been certified as a Great Place to Work in 33 markets globally.

feed.title: CFOs should view AI projects as a portfolio of very different use cases, Gartner says
feed.summary: Gartner advises CFOs to approach AI investments not as a single ROI strategy, but as a diverse portfolio of use cases, each with unique timelines, goals, risks, and costs. The advisory firm highlights that acquiring skilled AI talent is the biggest challenge for finance chiefs, and AI projects yield both financial and non-financial value that should be considered. CFOs are encouraged to build a balanced portfolio including productivity, process improvement, and transformational AI initiatives, understanding that immediate financial returns may not always be the primary indicator of success.

feed.title: Main Street Announces Follow-On Investment
feed.summary: Main Street Capital Corporation (NYSE: MAIN) has completed a follow-on investment in its portfolio company, Trantech Radiator Topco, LLC, with co-investor MSC Income Fund, Inc. (NYSE: MSIF). This investment supports Trantech's strategic acquisition of Transformer Maintenance and Service, Inc., enhancing Trantech's capabilities in utility equipment maintenance and repair services. Main Street's additional investment amounted to $24.7 million in senior secured term debt and a $1.4 million direct equity investment.

feed.title: Conagra Brands Q3 Earnings Call Highlights
feed.summary: Conagra Brands reported a return to organic net sales growth in Q3 2026, driven by strong performance in frozen foods and snacks, while focusing on free cash flow and debt reduction. Despite a dip in margins and earnings due to elevated inflation, the company raised its free cash flow conversion target and reduced net debt. However, it narrowed its fiscal year guidance and cut the adjusted EPS outlook, primarily due to a weaker contribution from the Ardent Mills joint venture rather than its core business.

feed.title: Janux Therapeutics Announces Development Candidate Nomination Under Bristol Myers Squibb Collaboration
feed.summary: Janux Therapeutics has announced the nomination of a development candidate as part of its ongoing collaboration with Bristol Myers Squibb. This brief notice, published by Reuters via TradingView, indicates a progression in their joint therapeutic development efforts. Specific details about the candidate or its therapeutic area were not provided in this announcement.

feed.title: Airport security lines now show in United app at Chicago, Newark, more
feed.summary: United Airlines has launched a pilot program on April 1, 2026, to integrate estimated TSA security wait times into its mobile app for travelers at its seven U.S. hub airports, including Chicago, Denver, and Newark. This new feature provides regular updates for specific lanes, such as standard security and TSA PreCheck, to help customers plan their travel more effectively. The airline emphasizes that while these estimates are based on available data, actual wait times may vary, and this initiative expands United's digital tools aimed at enhancing the day-of-travel experience.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams To Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results On April 28, 2026
feed.summary: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) is scheduled to announce its first-quarter 2026 financial results on April 28, 2026. This brief announcement, sourced from Refinitiv, provides a heads-up for investors and analysts awaiting the company's Q1 performance update.

feed.title: Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff shares when Microsoft stopped the company from investing in OpenAI, says: We
feed.summary: Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff revealed that Microsoft actively prevented Salesforce from investing in OpenAI. Despite Microsoft's interference, Salesforce ultimately invested in a series of other AI companies like Cohere, Mistral, and Anthropic. Benioff has been critical of Microsoft's competitive practices and its influence over the AI ecosystem, emphasizing Salesforce's commitment to remaining a key player in enterprise AI.

feed.title: PNC Financial Is Up 43% From Its 52-Week Low: Why the Rally Has More Room to Run
feed.summary: PNC Financial Services Group (PNC) has seen a 43% rally from its 52-week low, driven by several factors including record full-year net income, the acquisition of FirstBank Holding Company, and potential relief from Basel III capital rule revisions. The bank is projected to achieve significant net interest margin (NIM) expansion, strong EPS growth, and an increased share repurchase program, positioning it for continued growth and an estimated 20% upside based on analyst targets. TIKR's valuation model suggests an even higher price target of $303.70, indicating the stock may be undervalued given its operational momentum.

feed.title: Monday.com (MNDY) Rises Yet Lags Behind Market: Some Facts Worth Knowing
feed.summary: Monday.com (MNDY) saw a 1.81% increase in its recent trading session, closing at $69.11, but this performance lagged behind the broader market indices like the S&P 500, Dow, and Nasdaq. The company is expected to report an EPS of $0.98, a 10.91% decrease year-over-year, and revenue of $338.9 million, up 20.07%. With a Zacks Rank of #3 (Hold) and attractive valuation metrics like a Forward P/E of 15.95 and PEG ratio of 0.58, investors are watching its upcoming earnings disclosure closely.

feed.title: NaaS Technology (NASDAQ: NAAS) CEO details share holdings
feed.summary: NaaS Technology Inc.'s CEO, Wang Yang, has filed an initial ownership report detailing her direct and indirect equity interests in the company. The report highlights her direct holdings of stock options for 713,600 and 32,441,600 Class A ordinary shares, with specific exercise prices and vesting schedules. Additionally, the filing reveals significant indirect holdings across Class A, B, C, and D ordinary shares through Newlink Envision Limited, Newlink Linkage Limited, and Newlinks Technology Limited, though Wang Yang disclaims beneficial ownership of many of these shares except for her proportionate pecuniary interest.

feed.title: March Social Media Round-Up—2025 Annual Review, World’s Most Ethical Companies, and More
feed.summary: Pfizer's March social media round-up highlights key achievements including being recognized as one of the World’s Most Ethical Companies for the fifth year. The company's CEO, Albert Bourla, shared the 2025 Annual Review and advancements in oncology and obesity research. The update also features positive results from ongoing studies and a look into breast cancer research and drug discovery processes.

feed.title: American Express just announced new lounge plans for 3 major U.S. airports. One concept truly stands out
feed.summary: American Express is expanding its airport lounge network with new developments at three major U.S. airports: Boston Logan, Charlotte, and Dallas-Fort Worth. Plans include a large new Centurion Lounge in Boston with an outdoor terrace, a major expansion of the existing Centurion Lounge in Dallas, and a second "Sidecar" lounge in Charlotte for quick stops. These initiatives demonstrate Amex's strategy to invest in both extensive flagship lounges and smaller, more efficient spaces for travelers.

feed.title: Veeam Recognized as a 2026 Gartner® Peer Insights™ Customers’ Choice for Backup and Data Protection Platforms
feed.summary: Veeam Software has been named a Customers’ Choice in the 2026 Gartner Peer Insights ‘Voice of the Customer’: Backup and Data Protection Platforms, based on end-user feedback and high ratings for its data resilience solutions. The company also highlights its strategy to unify data resilience, data security, and AI governance, supported by its acquisition of Securiti AI and introduction of Agent Commander. This recognition follows Veeam's ninth consecutive placement in the Leaders Quadrant of the Gartner Magic Quadrant for Backup & Data Protection Platforms.

feed.title: Iran tells Microsoft, Amazon and Boeing employees to evacuate Middle East offices immediately after attacks threatened
feed.summary: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) has issued a warning for employees of 18 major American companies, including Microsoft, Amazon, and Boeing, to evacuate their Middle East offices by Wednesday morning ahead of threatened attacks. The IRGC accuses these companies of supporting U.S. and Israeli military operations in the ongoing conflict, citing previous damage to Amazon Web Services data centers. While the credibility of the threat is being assessed, affected companies are taking steps to protect their personnel and facilities.

feed.title: Old Dominion will post Q1 results before market opens April 29
feed.summary: Old Dominion Freight Line, Inc. (Nasdaq: ODFL) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results before the market opens on Wednesday, April 29, 2026. The company will host a conference call to discuss these results and its outlook at 10:00 a.m. (Eastern Time) on the same day, with a webcast available at ir.odfl.com and a telephonic replay accessible afterward. Old Dominion provides LTL motor carrier services across North America, including expedited transportation and value-added services.

feed.title: PODD Investor Alert: Insulet Corp. Potential Securities Fraud Lawsuit - Investors With Losses May Seek to Lead the Class Action After Company Allegedly Concealed Device Defect: Levi & Korsinsky
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has issued an investor alert regarding a potential securities fraud lawsuit against Insulet Corp. (NASDAQ: PODD). This follows a voluntary medical device correction disclosing a design defect in Omnipod 5 insulin pods that led to insulin leakage and serious adverse events. The firm is investigating whether the company concealed this defect from investors before its public disclosure.

feed.title: Massimo Group Reports FY2025 Results, Delivers Margin Expansion and Advances Premium Product Pipeline
feed.summary: Massimo Group (NASDAQ: MAMO) announced its financial results for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, reporting improved gross margins and a strategic rebalancing of dealer inventory. Despite a decrease in revenue and net income compared to FY2024, the company's gross margin expanded significantly to 37.5%. Massimo Group is also advancing its premium product pipeline with the introduction of HVAC-equipped UTVs and electric carts, aiming for higher-value opportunities and stable long-term growth.

feed.title: Principal Financial sets April 24 investor call after Q1 results
feed.summary: Principal Financial Group (Nasdaq: PFG) announced that it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results after market close on April 23, 2026. A conference call to discuss these results will be held on April 24, 2026, at 10 a.m. ET, featuring leadership and a Q&A session. Interested parties can access the webcast and related materials on the company's investor relations website.

feed.title: Profit more than doubled as MicroAlgo cut costs and lifted 2025 earnings
feed.summary: MicroAlgo (NASDAQ: MLGO) announced a substantial increase in net profit for the year ended December 31, 2025, reaching RMB 127.56 million (USD 18.15 million), a 143.5% rise year-over-year. Diluted earnings per share also surged by 272.7% to RMB 14.87. This growth was attributed to strong profitability, effective cost control measures, and an increase in total shareholders' equity.

feed.title: Chip veteran Kurt Sievers joins Booking board as Lynn Radakovich exits
feed.summary: Booking Holdings (NASDAQ: BKNG) has appointed Kurt Sievers, the former CEO of NXP Semiconductors, to its Board of Directors, effective April 1, 2026. Sievers brings extensive experience in technology, mobility, and global consumer markets from his leadership at NXP from 2020 to 2025. Concurrently, Lynn Radakovich will retire from the board at the company's Annual Meeting in June after a decade of service.

feed.title: Navient Corp (Moved to Nasdaq) stock: Business model resilience amid rating shifts and technical bre
feed.summary: Navient Corp (NAVI) is facing a pivotal moment with analyst upgrades to "Hold" coinciding with the stock falling below its 200-day moving average. The company specializes in student loan servicing and asset management, adapting to regulatory changes by focusing on third-party servicing and technology. Despite high debt-to-equity, Navient exhibits operational resilience and liquidity, with investors monitoring its performance amidst sector challenges and policy shifts.

feed.title: Franklin Templeton Agrees to Acquire Liquid Strategies from CoinFund Spinoff, Launches Franklin Crypto
feed.summary: Franklin Templeton is set to acquire 250 Digital, an active cryptocurrency investment management firm, which includes its investment team and liquid cryptocurrency strategies previously managed by CoinFund. This acquisition will lead to the formation of Franklin Crypto, co-led by Christopher Perkins, Seth Ginns, and Tony Pecore, aiming to expand Franklin Templeton's digital asset investment management platform and enhance its capabilities in the digital asset market. The transaction, expected to close in Q2 2026, will notably involve BENJI tokens as part of the payment consideration, showcasing an innovative approach to M&A on-chain.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin will post Q1 results before markets open Apr. 23
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin (NYSE: LMT) will webcast its first-quarter 2026 earnings results conference call on Thursday, April 23, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. The earnings will be published prior to market open on the same day. An on-demand replay and podcast will be available through May 7, 2026.

feed.title: APO Investor Alert: APOLLO GLOBAL MANAGEMENT, INC. Securities Fraud Lawsuit - Investors With Losses May Seek to Lead the Class Action After Allegedly Misrepresenting CEO Accountability: Levi & Korsinsky
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has issued an investor alert regarding a securities class action lawsuit against Apollo Global Management, Inc. (NYSE: APO). The lawsuit alleges that CEO Marc Rowan and co-founder Leon Black are individually liable for misrepresenting CEO accountability and making false statements regarding the company's relationship with Jeffrey Epstein. Investors with losses are encouraged to seek lead plaintiff appointment by May 1, 2026.

feed.title: Medpace Holdings, Inc. Investigated by the Portnoy Law Firm
feed.summary: The Portnoy Law Firm has announced an investigation into Medpace Holdings, Inc. for potential securities fraud, following a significant drop in Medpace's stock price on July 23, 2024. The decline occurred after the release of underperforming Q2 2024 financial results, which included unexpectedly high contract cancellations. The firm is encouraging affected Medpace investors to contact them to discuss their legal rights.
